programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The "Big Island" of Hawaii boasts both lush tropical splendor and stark volcanic beauty. But today Dog and the team can't spend much time taking in the sights, they need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different than the all girls private school.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog, Beth and the team are in Colorado and today they face a special Chapman challenge--getting the kids to camp. After the drop-off, Dog is more than ready to track down a fugitive.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog is tracking down Cecilia, who's wanted for aggravated car theft, but she's nowhere to be found.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Michael is out on bail for drug sales, theft, and violation of parole. Dog's after him for failing to appear in court and his only lead is Jen, his co-signer and girlfriend.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: A Hawaiian surfing hero is on a wave to nowhere and it's Dog's turn to play lifeguard. "Buttons," known throughout the islands for his prowess on the waves and his daring 360's, has wiped-out on the rocky shoals of drug addiction.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Facing hard time for forging checks, Melissa pulled a vanishing act at her sentencing hearing, bolting from the courthouse in broad daylight. Lucky for her bondsman, Dog and his posse are in Colorado and ready to help.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog knows that it is better to give than to receive, so when a fellow bondsman grieving for his recently departed spouse requests his help, he jumps into action. Studying the fugitive's file the team uncovers a surprising fact.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Colorado bondsman Bobby Brown's got trouble and his name is Jackson. Weighing in at over 240lbs and standing six foot tall this bad boy has skipped out on a $10,000 bond.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's got a twofer on his hands, but the cases couldn't be more different. The first is a woman whose family wants her back in jail, the other is a former choirboy whose family ties are strong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't know it yet, but today's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the team isn't pulling any punches, literally or figuratively! In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train.

programme.desc: Dog's got a twofer on his hands, but the cases couldn't be more different. The first is a woman whose family wants her back in jail, the other is a former choirboy whose family ties are strong.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the crew is hunting for Holly, a car thief. She's one of Tim's bonds and the entire Dog crew knows that means trouble--or at least a long and difficult chase.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog doesn't know it yet, but today's bounty is about to take him on a trip down memory lane and test his investigative chops. With each lead propelling him closer and closer to his childhood haunts, Dog uses old-fashioned detective skills.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Today the team isn't pulling any punches, literally or figuratively! In between tracking down a potentially dangerous ex-con facing a five year stretch in the big house, Leland is struggling to find time to train.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: The "Big Island" of Hawaii boasts both lush tropical splendor and stark volcanic beauty. But today Dog and the team can't spend much time taking in the sights, they need to help Leland hunt down some elusive fugitives.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Cecily has graduated from High School and Dog believes the time is right to show her what the family business is all about. The rough and tumble world of bounty hunting is very different than the all girls private school.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Roger has 27 prior arrests, spent years in jail and doesn't want to go back. But he's missed court and now Dog has to bring him in.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog's target today seems to have a taste for drugs and a record of reckless driving. The hunt has deep emotional resonance for the team because today is the anniversary of the fatal car accident of Dog's daughter Barbara Katie.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter
programme.desc: Dog and Beth take time from their busy schedule to thank their fans by inviting them into their home to celebrate the holiday season. But when Dog decides he needs to help his son Garry believe in Santa Claus again the plan changes.

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: Dog the Bounty Hunter

programme.title: TV-G
programme.desc: Dr. Rae and Peter confront wildlife injuries: Rae helps save an orphaned sloth in Central America; they tackle fishing-gear threats to North Atlantic right whales with a fisherman leading change; and aid Florida manatees hurt by boat strikes.

programme.title: TV-G
programme.desc: Peter and Dr. Rae join the world’s largest fish—whale sharks. In Mexico, Peter dives with researchers using telemetry and biologgers to track health and migrations. At the Georgia Aquarium, they observe and monitor two captive whale sharks up close.

programme.title: TV-G
programme.desc: Peter and Dr. Rae visit Churchill, Manitoba—the polar bear capital—to meet North America’s largest carnivores. With climate change thinning sea ice, they join scientists using tags and drones to track hunting, migration, and ways to protect bears.

programme.title: TV-G
programme.desc: Dr. Rae and Peter celebrate women leading conservation: Peter helps Lauren Hinson with coatis at Brevard Zoo, flies with Orla O’Brien to survey right whales; Dr. Rae teams with Rhodes, Reeves, and SeaWorld on whales, ocelots, and manatee rehab.

programme.title: TV-G
programme.desc: Dr. Rae and Peter dive into shark conservation: attacks are rare, but humans kill millions and over a third of species face extinction. Peter tags a bull shark off Florida; in a Bahamas sanctuary they monitor sharks, meet reef and nurse sharks.

programme.title: TV-G
programme.desc: From Central America to the Canadian border, we catch and release wildlife. In South Florida, Peter tags baby crocodiles at a nuclear plant. In Panama, Dr. Rae rescues and relocates a sloth. In the Great Lakes, Peter surveys lake sturgeon.

programme.title: TV-G
programme.desc: Join Dr. Rae and Peter to help save Belugas. At Georgia Aquarium, five belugas aid research guiding conservation. In Churchill, Manitoba, they meet curious pods, hear underwater calls, and champion protecting this pristine habitat.

programme.title: TV-G
programme.desc: Peter and Dr. Rae cross America’s endangered prairies. In Wyoming Native lands, Peter sees bison return. In Montana, Dr. Rae spotlights prairie dogs, prairie engineers. Along the SoCal border, she helps save burrowing owls with artificial burrows.

programme.title: TV-G
programme.desc: We spotlight conservation icons: In the Bahamas, Dr. Rae helps release a green sea turtle. Peter meets polar bears at Columbus Zoo to learn their plight. In Panama, Dr. Rae honors the harpy eagle. In Mexico, Peter studies whale shark tourism.

programme.title: TV-G
programme.desc: Since 1963, Wild Kingdom has fought for wildlife. See two U.S. comebacks: California condors—Peter aids biologists; Dr. Rae visits an egg lab—and in Texas, Peter helps relocate an endangered antelope once extinct in the wild.

programme.title: TV-G
programme.desc: Dr. Rae and Peter get up-close with wildlife: Texas—Peter meets a rattlesnake and protected tortoise; New Hampshire—Rae helps check a hibernating mother bear and three cubs; Churchill—kayaking Hudson Bay to study curious belugas.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A look at the possibility that the human brain possesses extraordinary untapped abilities granted by extraterrestrial beings -- such as telepathy, precognition and psychokinesis; abilities that will enable the next step in the evolution of humans.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: In 2019, millions responded to an internet post advocating to storm the gates of the world's most top-secret military installation -- Area 51 but when they did, the U.S. military vowed to defend the base with deadly force.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Satellite images, ground-penetrating radar and thermal scanning leads to new evidence that appears to substantiate the belief held by millions of people that Earth has been visited in the past by extraterrestrial beings.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Researchers study giant ancient drawings found etched into the desert floor, which may be a part of an ancient alien code.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A look at whether or not intelligent robots are a threat to humanity or the next step in human evolution; as man and machine begin to merge, humanity could be fulfilling a destiny prepared for by aliens thousands of years ago.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Aliens from the tiny star Sirius B may have visited humans in the distant past, imparting the knowledge of civilization to peoples thousands of miles apart.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: A look at the possibility that the human brain possesses extraordinary untapped abilities granted by extraterrestrial beings -- such as telepathy, precognition and psychokinesis; abilities that will enable the next step in the evolution of humans.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: In 2019, millions responded to an internet post advocating to storm the gates of the world's most top-secret military installation -- Area 51 but when they did, the U.S. military vowed to defend the base with deadly force.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Millions of people around the world have reported encountering shadowy entities who instill fear, shortness of breath, and even paralysis; they could be figments of the imagination or visitors from other worlds or dimensions.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: In numerous ancient cultures throughout the world, stories were told of ancestors that came to Earth from the Pleiades star cluster, but could new scientific findings reveal that humankind's true origins lie not on Earth but 400 light years away.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Ancient cultures recorded stories of enormous beings that descended from the sky; exploring if massive megalithic structures and reported discoveries of towering human-like skeletons reveal that the world was once inhabited by giants.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: The Chilean government questions whether new footage from a Navy helicopter indicates a connection to geoglyphs in the Atacama Desert.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Strange ancient objects that leave archaeologists at a loss could suggest that an advanced extraterrestrial civilization existed on Earth for thousands of years.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: Today, more people than ever believe that unidentified flying objects are of alien origin; exploring the possibility that they are capable of bending both time and space.

programme.title: Ancient Aliens
programme.desc: In the Mojave Desert, there is a structure built to bestow everlasting life and according to the architect, the blueprint was provided by an extraterrestrial visitor known as the Integratron, could it actually provide the key to immortality.

programme.title: The Killing of JonBenet: Her Father Speaks
programme.desc: Offers never-before-seen details including her dad’s response to the 20th anniversary, a 1998 interview with her brother and damning DNA evidence.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All
programme.desc: In 1989, 21-year-old Lyle and 18-year-old Erik Menendez walked into their parents' den and killed them. In this limited series premiere, Erik Menendez himself shares in stunning detail the events of the week leading up to the murders and the motive behind the crime that shocked America.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All
programme.desc: The Trial of the Century takes a shocking turn when the defense says Erik and Lyle Menendez killed their parents after years of sexual abuse.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All
programme.desc: Erik Menendez recalls his mother's decline in the years leading up to the murders and looks on in agony as his brother Lyle testifies, vividly describing the abuse at the hands of their father.

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All
programme.desc: The first trial ends in a stunning surprise verdict. Erik alone takes us inside the prep for his second trial, his unlikely connection with OJ Simpson, and why he alone is left to speak for both the brothers

programme.title: The Menendez Murders: Erik Tells All
programme.desc: After the verdict comes in, at the last minute, Erik Menendez and his brother, Lyle, are sent to separate prisons. Erik marries and begins to mount an appeal. Will his case be given another chance?

programme.title: The Killing of JonBenet: Her Father Speaks
programme.desc: Offers never-before-seen details including her dad’s response to the 20th anniversary, a 1998 interview with her brother and damning DNA evidence.

programme.desc: Emily's husband, Kyle, starts acting strange after a woman named Lily shows up on their doorstep claiming to be her half sister. When Emily is suddenly poisoned, Kyle blames Lily -- but Emily becomes suspicious that Kyle may be the culprit.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: When Carol Jarvis disappears, her husband tells friends and family that she's simply gone on a little holiday.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Police in Aurora, Colorado find the body of a young man in his own home with a bullet wound to the head.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Dayton Leroy Rogers, known as The Molalla Forest Killer, is a serial killer who mutilates and kills at least eight women.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Over a 25-year career of murder, Richard Biegenwald kills at least six people.

programme.title: World's Most Evil Killers
programme.desc: Jailed for the dreadful murder of a children's author, Ian Stewart receives a second conviction for the death of his wife, six years earlier.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Anchorage, Alaska, a young mother and her two daughters were sexually assaulted and brutally murdered. There was only one piece of forensic evidence: a washrag carrying pubic lice that the killer used to clean himself after the crime. Employing an unusual and original method, an FBI expert combed through all the hairs and fibers in the apartment. He was not only able to determine how long each hair had been there, but which hairs came from the killer and how the crime proceeded.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: When a young boy and his mother were kidnapped and murdered by a vicious drug cartel, FBI agents in the field worked tirelessly to pierce the secretive drug underworld and unearth those involved. Their surveillance and investigative work uncovered a violent trail of murder and greed. FBI agents and forensic examiners pieced together the evidence needed to draw out and then crush the cartel.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Langley, Virginia, a gunman fired into rush hour traffic. The brazen daytime shooting of employees from the Central Intelligence Agency stunned the country. The victims seemed randomly selected, but the motive appeared to be political. The FBI was called in, but the nationwide search quickly became a far-reaching international manhunt. Agents processed more than 2000 leads and crossed an ocean in the effort to deliver justice.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: When five-year-old Melissa Brannen disappeared from a Christmas party in December 1989, the only probable suspect was 24-year-old Caleb Hughes. Hughes reportedly left the party around the time Melissa vanished, but no one saw him with the girl. Fifty blue acrylic fibers collected during a search of Hughes' car, however, became the major piece of evidence in the case. FBI fiber analysis determined that those fibers were identical to the ones that made up the sweater Melissa was wearing.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI (Doblado)
programme.desc: El 21 de junio de 1964, tres defensores de los derechos civiles, uno blanco y uno negro, desaparecieron de Mississippi mientras cruzaban el condado de Neshoba. Una investigación del FBI a gran escala llevó a la recuperación de los cuerpos de los hombres asesinados y la evidencia física fue recuperada y analizada. Los laboratorios del FBI confirmaron que todas excepto una de las balas usadas para asesinar a los hombres provenían de la misma arma. El FBI se ganó la confianza de un informante, cuya información condujo a la condena de siete miembros del Ku Klux Klan local.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI (Doblado)
programme.desc: El primero de octubre de 1993, un extraño secuestró a Polly Klaas de doce años durante una piyamada en su casa. El FBI de inmediato entró en el caso. Los agentes reunieron fibras de su habitación y descubrieron, a través del uso de fuentes de luz láser, la huella de una palma en la cama de Polly, previamente invisible al ojo humano. Después de una extensa investigación de dos meses, el FBI arrestó a Richard Allen Davis. La impresión de la palma y las fibras coincidieron y Davis fue condenado por secuestro y asesinato.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In Alabama, a pair of convicted felons escaped the custody of a local deputy and fled across the country. Eluding authorities, they moved from state to state in a wave of abduction and car theft. When a foreign military officer disappeared along their trail, police and FBI agents wondered if the armed fugitives had become killers. Agents believed the pair were growing more violent and raced to find the escapees before more victims crossed their path.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A young mother and her infant son mysteriously disappeared from their home. The woman's husband was the only suspect, but he was eventually cleared. There was no solid evidence that a crime had even been committed. Six months later, a local farmer found the remains of the missing woman and her child. Both had been murdered. Agents and local police had only one tiny piece of evidence, an unidentified hair found in the murdered woman's car. The hair was too small for analysis.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A day that began with a class field trip ended with a parent's worst nightmare. An 11-year-old girl was missing. Her parents were certain she was no runaway. When they failed to find her in their quiet Illinois neighborhood, they called the police. The FBI soon joined the investigation and family and friends worked with detectives and agents in an urgent search for the missing girl. Faced with conflicting witness reports and false leads, agents wouldn't stop until they found the girl, and the truth.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A stranger snatched an eight-year-old girl as she played in her Tucson, Arizona neighborhood, leaving behind an abandoned bicycle and a frantic mother. Hundreds of citizens and police officers fanned out across the region, hoping to find some trace of the young girl or her abductor. Within hours, a suspect emerged; a drifter who was out on parole for abducting and molesting children. He was nowhere to be found and time had run out for the innocent child.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1987, a successful television producer was gunned down in his New York office. It looked like a professional hit. With no leads, the investigation stalled. Four years later and a continent away, a man told Los Angeles police he had been hired to murder two exotic dancers. Investigators linked the two crimes and uncovered a businessman willing to kill to protect his interests.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: A Labor Day weekend turned into a nightmare of murder as a cross-country crime spree terrorized the nation. In a small Ohio community, an elderly woman and a teenage boy disappeared within hours of each other. Police believed the cases were linked, but didn't know how. They contacted the FBI for help. A trail of stolen vehicles and murder victims across seven states led agents on a hunt for two suspected killers. Their only hope of stopping them was to anticipate the killers' next move.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In July 1997, a triple murder terrified residents in the nation's capital. In a Georgetown coffee shop, three employees were shot to death. Investigators could find no immediate suspects and no clear motive for the attack. Evidence at the crime scene pointed in many different directions. Was this a hate crime, a robbery gone wrong, or an act of cold-blooded vengeance against one of the victims?

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: On the day before Thanksgiving, a mother discovered her 10 year-old son was missing from his school. No one knew how it could have happened. Within hours, the boy's entire family was frantically searching for him. The few leads in the case quickly turned cold and the FBI was called in to aid in the investigation. The search by agents and local authorities would cover a thousand miles to expose the kidnapper and find the missing child.

programme.title: Los archivos del FBI (Doblado)
programme.desc: El 21 de junio de 1964, tres defensores de los derechos civiles, uno blanco y uno negro, desaparecieron de Mississippi mientras cruzaban el condado de Neshoba. Una investigación del FBI a gran escala llevó a la recuperación de los cuerpos de los hombres asesinados y la evidencia física fue recuperada y analizada. Los laboratorios del FBI confirmaron que todas excepto una de las balas usadas para asesinar a los hombres provenían de la misma arma. El FBI se ganó la confianza de un informante, cuya información condujo a la condena de siete miembros del Ku Klux Klan local.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In 1992, a young mother was gunned down in front of her children. Police searched for answers, but found none. The horrible crime appeared unmotivated, senseless, and random. Then, family members offered a startling clue. The victim, the wife of a prominent Atlanta attorney, was also a woman burdened with a secret; a secret the FBI believed led to her death. It would force local and federal agents to untangle an intricate web of money, drugs and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Larry Horn nearly got away with the perfect crime: a multiple murder-for-hire plot that was meticulously planned and executed. Horn's former wife, their 8-year-old son, and a live-in nurse were all brutally murdered by an assassin. In the absence of any significant clues, police in Maryland contacted the FBI to assist in the investigation.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: On Mississippi's Gulf Coast, a judge and his politician wife were brutally murdered in their home. The killer left few clues and the investigation led nowhere. But the FBI was patiently waiting in the wings. Once it was determined that federal laws had been violated, they pounced on the investigation. They uncovered a corrupt local government and a group of violent criminal conspirators known as the Dixie Mafia, responsible for fraud, money laundering and murder.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: At first it seemed like a tragic hunting accident when 18-year-old David Wilkey was shot to death in rural Virginia in 1983. A tenacious insurance investigator suspected foul play, but he had no direct evidence. Two years later a man contacted North Carolina FBI agents with a complex story of conspiracy and murder-for-hire: he claimed he had been hired to murder Wilkey's killer.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: He was a recluse who spread terror through the mail for 18 years. Two men died and more than a dozen were injured, but Ted Kaczynski wasn't known as the Unabomber until his brother tipped off the FBI. Kaczynski's “Unabomber Manifesto,” published in major newspapers, set off a flurry of activity for the FBI: writing analysis and comparisons, DNA gleaned from a single postage stamp and finally, Kaczynski's arrest at his tiny cabin.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: When a Delaware woman vanished in 1996, family and friends discovered her secret life. The appointments secretary to the Governor had carried on an illicit affair with a wealthy married man. Agents suspected that her powerful ex-lover was responsible, but they had little physical evidence to support their theory. Investigators never found the woman's body or the murder weapon. The FBI's only hope was to go undercover, and turn brother against brother.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In rural Texas, 13-year-old is kidnapped on her way to school. Frantic to find her safely, her millionaire father calls local authorities and the FBI. As police officers and agents conduct aerial surveillance, the father drives hundreds of miles through the night to deliver the ransom cash to a drop that the kidnappers keep changing. In a final effort to save the young girl, investigators must engage in a dangerous firefight with five desperate criminals.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: In February of 1996, New Jersey millionaire Frank Black flew to Florida to close a major business deal before retiring. He never came home. Authorities in New Jersey sensed foul play and brought in the FBI. Agents learned of a mystery woman in Florida who was to meet Black. Phone records showed a flood of calls to Black from his business rival just before the disappearance.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Beginning in California in 1995, a serial killer targeted vulnerable women. At first charming and generous, he quickly became violent. He was brutal with his kills and quick in his getaways. Traveling across the country, he struck in Mississippi, Louisiana and Florida. The FBI and local police needed to stop this cross-country killer before more women fell victim to his insatiable rage.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: By December 1985, John Gotti had assumed his place as the new Don of the Gambino crime family in New York with the assassination of his boss, Paul Castellano. The Teflon Don felt secure in his position, always remaining one step ahead of the law. But he was also the ongoing obsession of Bruce Mouw, leader of an elite crew of FBI agents formed to bring down the Gambino family. With the help and genius of his Special Projects Squad, bugs were planted in Gotti's most private meeting places.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: On a chilly afternoon in 1989, Marine Captain Shirley Russell disappeared from Quantico, Virginia. Captain Russell was a dedicated officer; her friends and colleagues were certain she had not gone AWOL. FBI agents found her husband, a former Marine, was acting strangely, and a blood-like stain on the couple's floor disappeared before agents could examine it. There was no body, no witness and no weapon.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: When police in a small Washington State community began looking into the disappearance of a 22-year-old woman, they had no way of knowing it would evolve into a nationwide hunt for a sexual sadist. Police knew the killer's identity, but he was a master of disguise. The FBI was called on to help. Agents discovered that several unsuspecting women across the northwest had fallen prey to his charms.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Corruption in the New Orleans Police Department grew like a cancer in the early 1990's. Lured by the easy wealth of the narcotics industry, crooked cops began breaking the laws they were sworn to uphold. They would stop at nothing, including murder, to protect their rackets. When it became clear they could no longer police themselves, the FBI got involved. Putting their lives on the line, undercover agents devised a way to flush out the violent cops and restore trust in the city's police force.

programme.title: The FBI Files
programme.desc: Residents of the small town of Noel, Missouri were shocked when one of their banks was robbed. When the bank president was nowhere to be found, the residents were outraged. The FBI discovered that things are not always as they appear. Minute clues led the agents to the body of the bank president. With no suspects, the FBI relied on dogged determination and modern forensics. Agents slowly pieced together tiny shreds of evidence.

programme.desc: Detectives and forensic experts recount the most extraordinary cold cases that were solved using the revolutionary technique of familial DNA testing.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A man convicted of murdering a woman in her upscale Austin, Texas, home tells his story for the first time.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: It was called "the trial of the century" and, decades after the polarizing case, questions remain; hear answers and insights through interviews done over the years, rare footage and revealing conversations with key players who offer new details.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: The discovery of a 19-year-old's car abandoned on a bridge in New Jersey turns into a missing person case that evolves into a monthslong homicide investigation; police discover a plot involving money, close friends and a fatal betrayal.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Eleven years after Connecticut mother Donna Palomba is raped in her home, investigators finally track down her attacker; Donna speaks out about the latest developments in the case, including her fight to keep her assailant from walking free.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman is found murdered after her close friend hears her screaming on the phone; the mysterious death of her boyfriend's twin brother leads investigators to a suspect.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A tight-knit Long Island family go to extraordinary lengths to find their missing sister.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A woman goes for a walk during a snowstorm and never returns.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: After a successful young doctor collapses, a blood test reveals cyanide poisoning, resulting in a criminal investigation.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: Oscar Pistorius shoots and kills his girlfriend just eight months after competing in the London Olympics, telling police that he believed she was an intruder and he was acting in self-defense.

programme.title: Dateline NBC
programme.desc: A Tennessee resident is murdered in her bedroom; investigators have little evidence and struggle to find answers.

programme.title: Bloomberg Real Yield

programme.title: LEADERS with Francine Lacqua:Alexander Stubb, President of Finland
programme.desc: What drives the world’s most influential minds? In Leaders with Francine Lacqua, Bloomberg’s award-winning anchor sits down with the decision-makers shaping our future to explore the personal stories behind their public personas. Insightful, cinematic and elegantly crafted, Leaders goes beyond the headlines to reveal the human side of leadership.

programme.title: Vico C: la vida del filósofo
programme.desc: La historia del cantante Vico C, compositor y pionero de la música urbana en español, desde sus inicios hasta su éxito internacional.

programme.title: Traficantes del vicio
programme.desc: Una mujer se une a una agencia de modelos en la ciudad, pero descubre que se trata de una red de trata de personas, poniendo su vida en peligro.

programme.title: Sangre de valientes
programme.desc: Las relaciones entre dos poderosas familias, Los Pérez y Los Altamirano, se dañan con la muerte accidental de uno de sus miembros.

programme.title: Rivals
programme.desc: Una historia moderna de Romeo y Julieta protagonizada por dos familias, una mexicana y una salvadoreña.

programme.desc: Una mujer se une a una agencia de modelos en la ciudad, pero descubre que se trata de una red de trata de personas, poniendo su vida en peligro.

programme.title: Salsa en Tel Aviv
programme.desc: Vicky viaja a Israel disfrazada de monja para encontrar a su marido, con quien perdió el contacto. Este reside como inmigrante ilegal en Tel Aviv, donde trabaja como profesor de salsa. Durante la aventura, Vicky conoce a un profesor universitario.

programme.title: Por amor al money
programme.desc: Días antes de su boda, un hombre pierde a su novia, su trabajo, su casa y su reputación debido a un plan ideado por un viejo enemigo.

programme.title: La noche de los Troyanos
programme.desc: Un grupo de mafiosos se lanza a una guerra total tras el secuestro de la esposa de un líder, desatando una serie de sangrientos enfrentamientos.

programme.desc: Las relaciones entre dos poderosas familias, Los Pérez y Los Altamirano, se dañan con la muerte accidental de uno de sus miembros.

programme.desc: Un grupo de mafiosos se lanza a una guerra total tras el secuestro de la esposa de un líder, desatando una serie de sangrientos enfrentamientos.

programme.title: Sangre de valientes
programme.desc: Las relaciones entre dos poderosas familias, Los Pérez y Los Altamirano, se dañan con la muerte accidental de uno de sus miembros.

programme.title: Sentenciados
programme.desc: Luego de una gran noche de fiesta, Rigoberto y su amigo Néstor buscan un tesoro ancestral, desatando un ciclo de peligro y muerte.

programme.title: La tierra prometida
programme.desc: La historia del pueblo hebreo tras la muerte de Moisés cuando, liderados por Josué, tendrán que enfrentarse a distintos reinos para tomar Canaán, la tierra que Dios les prometió.

programme.title: Apuesta Final
programme.desc: Dae-gil, un príncipe obligado a vivir como un plebeyo, arriesga su vida cuando usa sus habilidades de juego para participar en una partida contra el rey Yeongjo, quien apuesta todo el Reino de Joseon.

programme.title: Sol naciente
programme.desc: Mario y Alicia son amigos de la infancia, él es nieto de migrantes italianos y ella es adoptada por Tanaka, un japonés. Cuando Alicia decide estudiar dos años en Japón, Mario se da cuenta de que lo que siente por ella es más que una amistad. Luego del reencuentro él tiene que lidiar con otro obstáculo, César, que trata de enamorar a la joven, pero con oscuras intenciones. Entonces, los Di Angelo y los Tanaka ponen a prueba sus sentimientos a pesar de las traiciones, las estafas y las mentiras.

programme.title: Orgullo y pasión
programme.desc: Elisabeta es una joven rebelde y llena de sueños que lucha contra el único destino para una mujer de buena familia en su época: casarse. Su osadía y su independencia la meterán en más de un problema.

programme.title: Jesús
programme.desc: La trayectoria de Jesucristo antes de la resurrección. Sus milagros y el calvario de la cruz. Las vidas de quienes fueron curados por Jesucristo y quiénes eran los apóstoles.

programme.title: La tierra prometida
programme.desc: La historia del pueblo hebreo tras la muerte de Moisés cuando, liderados por Josué, tendrán que enfrentarse a distintos reinos para tomar Canaán, la tierra que Dios les prometió.

programme.title: La tierra prometida
programme.desc: La historia del pueblo hebreo tras la muerte de Moisés cuando, liderados por Josué, tendrán que enfrentarse a distintos reinos para tomar Canaán, la tierra que Dios les prometió.

programme.title: VIP
programme.desc: La historia de Mi-na impulsa a Hyeon-a a dar un valiente paso adelante. Se revela la identidad de la persona que envió el mensaje de texto.

programme.title: Génesis
programme.desc: Lea está embarazada y tendrá al primogénito de Jacob, y la noticia enloquece de celos a Raquel. Una extraña mujer llega a la aldea de Esaú y el le pide ayuda para dañar a Jacob. Isaac espera noticas de su hijo Jacob, pero no llegan.

programme.title: Señora del Destino
programme.desc: María do Carmo es una madre de cinco hijos que triunfó en la vida con mucha lucha y tesón, pero que todavía tendrá una batalla que luchar: obtener el cariño de su hija quien fue secuestrada cuando era una recién nacida.

programme.title: Melissa
programme.desc: Sermin queda en coma después del accidente que sufrió y Metin se preocupa mucho. Melissa se siente querida y cuidada en casa de Mahinur y le cuenta sobre el miedo que siente de volver al lugar en el que vivía antes.

programme.title: El Laberinto de Alicia
programme.desc: Efraín se enfurece y golpea a Santiago sin justificación. Manuel descubre que Ramón habla con el Gato desde hace años.

programme.title: El clon
programme.desc: Leonardo luce duro y fuerte, pero por dentro siente un profundo dolor y exige una investigación para confirmar la identidad de su hijo Diego. Cristina llega para consolarlo y la trata muy mal.

programme.title: VIP
programme.desc: La historia de Mi-na impulsa a Hyeon-a a dar un valiente paso adelante. Se revela la identidad de la persona que envió el mensaje de texto.
